name: business translation: a large scale maps to performance-efficiency autoscaling concerns
command:
cat > profile.json <<'JEOF'
{"schema_version":"1.0","complete":true,"answers":{"workload":"gov analytics","motivation":"compliance","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"seconds","data_sensitivity":"regulated","compliance_regime":"il5","scale":"large","budget_posture":"cost-first"}}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-translate.sh" --profile profile.json --out tr.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("tr.json","utf8"));const p=(j.pillars["performance-efficiency"]||[]).map(c=>c.concern);process.exit(p.includes("autoscaling")?0:1)' && echo perf-mapped 1>&2
